title: Digital Service Design Standard - NZ Government
description: New Zealand government standard providing design principles and guidance for creating user-focused, inclusive, and secure digital services. Encompasses 12 core principles covering user needs, security, privacy, equity, team structure, collaboration, data stewardship, and public accountability.
